amendments.text: There must be an airspeed placard in clear view of the pilot and as close as practicable to the airspeed indicator: This placard must list-- [(a) The operating maneuvering speed VO; and] (b) The maximum landing gear operating speed VLO. 90-18; Issued on 06/15/90. --> Link to eCFR --> NPRM ACTIONS:   Notice of Proposed Rulemaking. Notice No. 90-18; Issued on 06/15/90. 26269; Issued on 07/28/93. --> Link to eCFR --> FINAL RULE ACTIONS:   Final Rule. Docket No. 26269; Issued on 07/28/93.

There must be an airspeed placard in clear view of the pilot and as close as practicable to the airspeed indicator. This placard must list-- (a) The operating maneuvering speed VO; and (b) The maximum landing gear operating speed VLO. [(c) For reciprocating multiengine-powered airplanes of more than 6,000 pounds maximum weight, and turbine engine-powered airplanes, the maximum value of the minimum control speed, VMC (one-engine-inoperative) determined under Sec. 23.149(b).] 94-22; Issued on 07/19/94. --> Link to eCFR --> NPRM ACTIONS:   Notice of Proposed Rulemaking. Notice No. 94-22; Issued on 07/19/94. 27807; Issued on 01/29/96. --> Link to eCFR --> FINAL RULE ACTIONS:   Final Rule. Docket No. 27807; Issued on 01/29/96.
